allow: Bash(git -c user.name=Rafael -c user.email=rafael@expedicao.local commit -m 'Fase 2: mundo 3D em blockout com movimentação *)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes"; if \($r.Content -match "Expedição Barra Sul"\) { Write-Output "OK: index.html servindo o titulo do jogo" } else { Write-Output "AVISO: titulo nao encontrado no HTML" }; $js = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/main.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "main.js: $\($js.StatusCode\), $\($js.Content.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match "Barra Sul" -and $r.Content -match "/src/main.js"\) { Write-Output "OK: HTML contem titulo do jogo e referencia main.js" } else { Write-Output "FALHA"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, 500\) })
Bash(git -c user.name=Rafael -c user.email=rafael@expedicao.local commit -m 'Feedback pass: velocidade, minimapa, camera auto-follow e detalhes *)
Bash(git -c user.name=Rafael -c user.email=rafael@expedicao.local commit -m 'Preparar deploy no GitHub Pages *)
Bash(GIT_SSH_COMMAND='ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o UserKnownHostsFile=C:\\Users\\User/.ssh/known_hosts' git push -u origin main)
